what_it_does: Defines a design-system preview card showing the dashboard screen-title treatment: display-weight bronze H1 text with secondary explanatory copy in a staged canvas area.
observations: Includes a dsCard metadata comment for group, name, subtitle, and viewport.
Loads shared styling from _card.css and adds file-local CSS for the preview layout.
Uses CSS variables for canvas background, radius, display/body fonts, bronze accent, and secondary foreground color.
Documents the title treatment in a lead paragraph, including display 700, approximately 36 px, bronze #988058, and a not-gold clarification.
Shows two example H1 titles: Brand Kit and Virtual Hub Settings.
standouts: The bronze color is explicitly named and contrasted with gold.
The preview demonstrates the same title treatment across two dashboard-like labels.
The stage groups title and subtitle pairs inside a canvas-colored rounded panel.
conventions: Uses a metadata HTML comment to describe the design-system card.
Keeps preview-specific CSS inline in the HTML file.
Uses tokenized CSS custom properties rather than hard-coded font families or theme colors.
Uses compact class names for card, stage, title, sub, and lead.
concerns: The lead text says approximately 36 px, while the .title CSS sets 38px.
The preview contains two h1 elements in one HTML document, which is semantically noisy outside a visual-spec context.
notes: This file is a visual spec card for how dashboard H1 screen titles should look.
questions: Is 38px the intended implementation size behind the documented approximately 36 px guidance?
Is the two-column title example meant to represent alternative screens or simultaneous layout usage?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the actual content: it presents the screen-title treatment for dashboard H1s using display 700 bronze typography.
intention_signals: It seems intended to make the dashboard title style easy to recognize and reuse by pairing written guidance with concrete rendered examples.
novelty: The file explicitly clarifies bronze rather than gold while demonstrating the treatment as a repeated dashboard H1 pattern.
contribution: Contributes a concrete screen-title substrate: bronze display-weight H1 typography, secondary explanatory copy, and a staged preview pattern for dashboard title usage.
summary_for_embedding: An HTML design-system preview card documenting and rendering the ConceptV dashboard screen-title treatment with bronze display-weight H1 examples.
intention_for_embedding: This was for communicating the intended dashboard H1 visual style through a compact handoff card with written guidance and examples.
